name: eclipse-battle-calculator
description: Battle calculator for Eclipse: Second Dawn for the Galaxy

scripts.build: bun build ./src/*.html --outdir ./dist --minify && cp src/sw.js dist/sw.js && cp src/favicons/apple-touch-icon.png dist/apple-touch-icon.png
scripts.test:solver: bun test src/engine/battle-rules.test.ts src/engine/battle-state.test.ts src/engine/dice-distribution.test.ts src/engine/win-probability-solver.test.ts src/engine/win-probability-solver.optimal.test.ts src/engine/win-probability-solver.minimax.test.ts src/engine/exact-combat.test.ts src/engine/optimal-damage-planner.test.ts
scripts.check: bun run typecheck && bun run lint && bun test && bun run build
